screens.name: Product Catalog
screens.description: Displays browsable list of products with filtering and sorting options.

screens.name: Product Details Page
screens.description: Comprehensive view of a single product, including variations, images, and stock status.

screens.name: Shopping Cart View
screens.description: Allows users to review, modify quantities, and remove items from the cart.

screens.name: Checkout: Shipping & Billing
screens.description: Collects and validates shipping and billing address information.

screens.name: Checkout: Review & Payment
screens.description: Displays final order summary, calculates totals, and collects payment details.

screens.name: Order Confirmation
screens.description: Displays success message and unique Order ID after successful payment.
